TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u niyazu' nu Sakul , tatama a tademaw. mikawaw i pu'ukwan. miyenkyu to tademaw i 'ayaw. tusa a wawa (tutuy), u acawana ci Valis, u Bunun cingra'.
S.PHON: u nijazuʔ~ʡ nu sakur~ɾ , tatama a tadəmaw. mikawaw i puʔ~ʡukwan. mijənkju to tadəmaw i ʔ~ʡajaw. tusa a wawa (tutuj), u aʦawana ʦi *ar~ɾis, u bunun ʦiŋraʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: u niyazu' nu Sakul , tatama a tademaw. mikawaw i pu'ukwan. miyenkyu to tademaw i 'ayaw. tusa a wawa (tutuy), u acawana ci Valis, u Bunun cingra'.
S.PHON: u nijazuʔ~ʡ nu sakur~ɾ , tatama a tadəmaw. mikawaw i puʔ~ʡukwan. mijənkju to tadəmaw i ʔ~ʡajaw. tusa a wawa (tutuj), u aʦawana ʦi *ar~ɾis, u bunun ʦiŋraʔ~ʡ.
